backup.title: Account Backup
backup.never_share: Never share this information. Anyone with it can access your account.
backup.private_key_warning: Warning: This Massa private key cannot be used to restore your Gossip account. Use this only for external wallet compatibility. To restore your Gossip account, you must use the 24-word mnemonic phrase.
backup.show_failed: Failed to show backup information. Please try again.

security.title: Security
security.native_only: Security settings are only available on native platforms (Android and iOS).

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.default_retention_description: New conversations will automatically use this retention policy.

web3.title: Web3
web3.mns_description: MNS (Massa Name System) is a decentralized naming service that maps human-readable domain names (like 'alice.massa') to any data like gossip IDs. When enabled, you can use MNS domains to identify and contact other users.
web3.mns_manage: Create and manage your MNS here:
web3.privacy_body: MNS domains link names to your gossip ID and thus to the MNS owner's Massa address. This creates a public association between your identity and blockchain addresses.
web3.trust_body: Resolving MNS domains requires trusting the Massa RPC response. The RPC endpoint could potentially provide incorrect or malicious resolution data.

background_sync.title: Background Sync
background_sync.learn_more: Learn more about battery optimization for your device

pwa.update_available: New content available, click on reload button to update.
